emergency.label: All Purpose
emergency.number: 999 (110 and 112 also redirect to the same 999 center)

entryRequirements.visaNote: Visitors from 60+ countries can enter visa-free for 30-180 days depending on nationality. Macau has its own immigration, separate from mainland China and Hong Kong.

transportInfo.paymentCard: Macau Pass (contactless card for buses and some shops)
mainSystems: Free casino shuttle buses (widely used, connect hotels/attractions)
transportInfo.note: Free hotel/casino shuttle buses are a genuinely useful budget transport hack that locals and savvy tourists both use.

majorEventsNote: Lunar New Year is by far the highest-demand period — casino/hotel prices peak.
